title: cinnamomum scortechinii
intro: Cinnamomum scortechinii, also known as East Indian cinnamon, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae. The medicinal properties of Cinnamomum scortechinii include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of using Cinnamomum scortechinii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Cinnamomum scortechinii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
